channel.title: Game Server FAQ
channel.description: Comprehensive game server configuration and troubleshooting guide

item.title: Config Files
item.content:encoded:
Configuration Files

- serverconfig.xml — Main server configuration: world name, ports, passwords, game settings. Paths: ./

- Data/Worlds/<worldname>/ — World save data. Paths: ./Data/Worlds/

- logs/output_log.txt — Server log file. Paths: ./logs/

- Mods/ — Server mods directory. Paths: ./Mods/

- Data/Config/ — Game configuration files. Paths: ./Data/Config/

item.title: Startup Parameters
item.content:encoded:
Default Command Line

7DaysToDieServer.exe -logfile logs/output_log.txt -configfile=serverconfig.xml -dedicated

Port Scheme

- Game Port (GP) (UDP) — GP (default 26900)

- Web Interface (TCP) — configurable (default 8080)

- Web Interface (TCP) — configurable (default 8081)

- Telnet (TCP) — configurable (default 8082)

Command Line Flags

-logfile — Log file path. Type: path, Default: logs/output_log.txt

-configfile — Server configuration file. Type: path, Default: serverconfig.xml

-dedicated — Run as dedicated server. Type: bool, Default:

-quit — Quit after loading (for testing). Type: bool, Default:

-batchmode — Run in batch mode. Type: bool, Default:

-nographics — Run without graphics. Type: bool, Default:

item.title: Troubleshooting
item.content:encoded:
Common Issues and Solutions

- Server not starting — verify serverconfig.xml syntax. Check file permissions. Review output_log.txt for errors.

- Players can't connect — open UDP game port and TCP web ports. Verify password settings. Check Steam authentication.

- World won't load — verify world name in serverconfig.xml. Check save file integrity. Restore from backup if corrupted.

- Performance issues — reduce MaxChunkAge and SaveDataLimit. Monitor RAM usage. Adjust MaxSpawnedZombies.

- Telnet/web interface not working — verify ports are open. Check ControlPanelEnabled and TelnetEnabled settings.

- Memory leaks — restart server regularly. Monitor for large save files. Clean up old backups.

item.title: Config Files
item.content:encoded:
Configuration Files

- ShooterGame/Saved/Config/WindowsServer/GameUserSettings.ini — Main server settings: rates, multipliers, PvP settings. Paths: ShooterGame/Saved/Config/WindowsServer/

- ShooterGame/Saved/Config/WindowsServer/Game.ini — Advanced game configuration and overrides. Paths: ShooterGame/Saved/Config/WindowsServer/

- ShooterGame/Saved/SavedArks/ — World save files. Paths: ShooterGame/Saved/SavedArks/

- ShooterGame/Content/Mods/ — Downloaded workshop mods. Paths: ShooterGame/Content/Mods/

- ShooterGame/Binaries/Win64/BattlEye/BEServer_x64.cfg — BattlEye configuration. Paths: ShooterGame/Binaries/Win64/BattlEye/

item.title: Startup Parameters
item.content:encoded:
Default Command Line

ShooterGameServer.exe TheIsland?listen?SessionName=MyServer?ServerPassword=mypass?ServerAdminPassword=adminpass?Port=7777?QueryPort=27015?MaxPlayers=20

Port Scheme

- Game Port (GP) (UDP) — GP (default 7777)

- Raw UDP Port (UDP) — GP+1 (default 7778)

- Query Port (UDP) — configurable (default 27015)

- RCON Port (TCP) — configurable (default 32330)

Command Line Flags

TheIsland — Map name (TheIsland, Ragnarok, TheCenter, etc.). Type: string, Default: TheIsland

?listen — Enable server listening mode. Type: bool, Default:

?SessionName — Server name in browser. Type: string, Default: MyServer

?ServerPassword — Server password. Type: string, Default:

?ServerAdminPassword — Admin password. Type: string, Default:

?Port — Game port. Type: int, Default: 7777

?QueryPort — Steam query port. Type: int, Default: 27015

?RCONPort — RCON port. Type: int, Default: 32330

?MaxPlayers — Maximum players. Type: int, Default: 20

?DifficultyOffset — Difficulty multiplier. Type: float, Default: 0.2

?ServerPVE — PvE mode. Type: bool, Default: false

?AllowFlyerCarryPvE — Allow flyer carry in PvE. Type: bool, Default: false

-automanagedmods — Auto-manage workshop mods. Type: bool, Default:

-mods — Workshop mod IDs (comma separated). Type: string, Default:

item.title: Troubleshooting
item.content:encoded:
Common Issues and Solutions

- Server not visible — open UDP 7777, 7778 and query port. Verify ?SessionName parameter. Check Steam server list.

- Mods not downloading — use -automanagedmods flag. Verify workshop mod IDs in -mods parameter. Check Steam Workshop connectivity.

- Save corruption — backup SavedArks folder regularly. Monitor disk space. Avoid force-stopping during saves.

- Performance issues — reduce ?MaxPlayers and difficulty settings. Monitor RAM usage (8GB+ recommended). Optimize GameUserSettings.ini rates.

- Players timing out — adjust network settings in GameUserSettings.ini. Check server CPU usage and network stability.

- BattlEye kicks — update BattlEye. Configure whitelist properly. Check for mod compatibility issues.

item.title: Steam Workshop
item.content:encoded:
Steam Workshop Configuration

- Workshop mods: -mods=ID1,ID2,ID3

- Auto-management: -automanagedmods (recommended)

- Mod download path: ShooterGame/Content/Mods/

- Manual installation: copy mod files to Content/Mods/

- Mod updates: handled automatically with -automanagedmods

item.title: Config Files
item.content:encoded:
Configuration Files

- server.cfg — Main server configuration: hostname, password, missions, admin settings. Paths: ./server.cfg

- basic.cfg — Basic network and performance settings. Paths: ./basic.cfg

- <profiles>/Users/<name>/<name>.Arma3Profile — Server profile with difficulty settings. Paths: <profiles>/Users/<name>/

- <profiles>/arma3server_*.rpt — Server log files. Paths: <profiles>/

- mpmissions/*.pbo — Multiplayer mission files. Paths: ./mpmissions/

- keys/*.bikey — Mod signature keys. Paths: ./keys/

- BattlEye/BEServer_x64.cfg — BattlEye configuration. Paths: ./BattlEye/

- @ModName/addons/*.pbo — Mod content files. Paths: @ModName/addons/

- @ModName/keys/*.bikey — Mod signature keys. Paths: @ModName/keys/

item.title: Startup Parameters
item.content:encoded:
Default Command Line

arma3server_x64.exe -ip=0.0.0.0 -port=2302 -config=server.cfg -cfg=basic.cfg -profiles=profiles -name=server -serverMod="@ACE;@CBA_A3" -mod="" -world=empty -autoinit

Port Scheme

- Game Port (GP) (UDP) — GP (default 2302)

- Steam query (UDP) — GP+1 (default 2303)

- Steam master (UDP) — GP+2 (default 2304)

- BattlEye RCon (TCP) — configurable (often GP+4) (default 2306)

Command Line Flags

-ip — Bind address. Type: ip, Default: 0.0.0.0

-port — Base game UDP port. Type: int, Default: 2302

-config — Server configuration file. Type: path, Default: server.cfg

-cfg — Basic configuration file. Type: path, Default: basic.cfg

-profiles — Profile directory. Type: path, Default: profiles

-name — Profile name. Type: string, Default: server

-serverMod — Server-side mods (semicolon separated). Type: string, Default:

-mod — Client mods (semicolon separated). Type: string, Default:

-world — World to preload (use 'empty' for faster start). Type: string, Default:

-autoinit — Auto-initialize server. Type: bool, Default:

-loadMissionToMemory — Load mission into memory. Type: bool, Default:

-noSound — Disable sound. Type: bool, Default:

-malloc — Memory allocator DLL. Type: path, Default:

-maxMem — Maximum memory in MB. Type: int, Default: auto

-cpuCount — CPU core count hint. Type: int, Default: auto

-exThreads — Extra threads (typical 3-7). Type: int, Default: auto

-enableHT — Enable hyper-threading. Type: bool, Default:

-hugepages — Enable huge pages. Type: bool, Default:

item.title: Troubleshooting
item.content:encoded:
Common Issues and Solutions

- Server not visible — open UDP 2302, 2303, 2304. Set reportingIP in server.cfg. Check Windows Firewall and router NAT settings.

- Mods not loading — verify mod paths in -serverMod/-mod. Check for missing dependencies. Ensure .bikey files match in keys/ folder.

- BattlEye kicks players — update BattlEye files. Check BEServer_x64.cfg for correct settings. Verify signature checks are properly configured.

- Performance issues — use -malloc=system or tbbmalloc_bi_x64.dll. Adjust -exThreads (try 3-7). Reduce viewDistance and AI count in missions.

- Memory crashes — increase -maxMem setting. Use 64-bit server executable. Monitor RAM usage and reduce large mods if necessary.

- Mission won't load — verify .pbo files in mpmissions/. Check requiredAddons in mission.sqm. Test mission in editor first.

- Workshop sync issues — ensure Steam Workshop integration is configured. Check mod compatibility between server and client versions.

item.title: Steam Workshop
item.content:encoded:
Steam Workshop Configuration

- Workshop content path: !Workshop (Steam Workshop integration)

- Server-side workshop loading: -serverMod="!Workshop"

- Client workshop content: -mod="!Workshop"

- Workshop mod format: @workshopID or !Workshop

- Automatic updates: handled by Steam integration

- Cache location: Steam/steamapps/workshop/content/107410/

item.title: Config Files
item.content:encoded:
Configuration Files

- server.cfg — Main server rules: hostname, password, passwordAdmin, maxPlayers, motd, voteMissionPlayers, voteThreshold, verifySignatures, equalModRequired, kickDuplicate, persistent, reportingIP, logFile, mission rotation. Paths: ./server.cfg, <root>/server.cfg

- basic.cfg — Network & bandwidth tuning: MinBandwidth, MaxBandwidth, MaxMsgSend, MinErrorToSend, MinErrorToSendNear, MaxSizeGuaranteed, MaxSizeNonGuaranteed, WindowSize, WindowCargoSize, MaxCustomFileSize, adapter, 3D_Performance, terrainGrid, viewDistance. Paths: ./basic.cfg

- Users/<name>/<name>.Arma2OAProfile — Difficulty & preferences profile. Paths: <profiles>/Users/<name>/

- Users/<name>/<name>.vars.Arma2OAProfile — Profile variables. Paths: <profiles>/Users/<name>/

- arma2oaserver.RPT — Runtime log and error messages. Paths: <profiles>/

- mpmissions/*.pbo — Mission files (e.g., co@xx_example.Chernarus.pbo, DayZ_Epoch_11.Chernarus.pbo). Paths: ./mpmissions/

- keys/*.bikey — Signature keys for allowed mods (must match client .bisign). Paths: ./keys/

- BattlEye/BEServer.cfg — RConPassword, RConPort (TCP), optional RConIP. Paths: ./BattlEye/

- BattlEye/bans.txt — Bans list. Paths: ./BattlEye/

- BattlEye/*.txt — Filters: scripts.txt, createvehicle.txt, remoteexec.txt, publicvariable.txt, setvariable.txt, addweaponcargo.txt. Paths: ./BattlEye/

- @DayZ_Epoch_Server/addons/dayz_server.pbo — DayZ Epoch server logic. Paths: @DayZ_Epoch_Server/addons/

- instance_<ID>_<Map>/config.cfg — DayZ instance config: host, port, names, passwords. Paths: ./

- instance_<ID>_<Map>/HiveExt.ini — MySQL connection, hive mode, time control. Paths: ./

- BEC/Config/Config.cfg — BEC general configuration. Paths: BEC/Config/

- BEC/Config/Scheduler.xml — BEC restarts/messages scheduler. Paths: BEC/Config/

- BEC/Config/Admins.xml — BEC admin definitions. Paths: BEC/Config/

item.title: Startup Parameters
item.content:encoded:
Default Command Line

arma2oaserver.exe -ip=0.0.0.0 -port=2302 -config=server.cfg -cfg=basic.cfg -profiles=profiles -name=server -world=empty -mod="@CBA" -nosplash -noPause

Port Scheme

- Game Port (GP) (UDP) — GP (default 2302)

- Steam query (UDP) — GP+1 (default 2303)

- Master/aux (UDP) — GP+2 (default 2304)

- Aux/voice (UDP) — GP+3 (default 2305)

- BattlEye RCon (TCP) — configurable (often GP+4) (default 2306)

Command Line Flags

-ip — Bind address. Type: ip, Default: 0.0.0.0

-port — Base game UDP port. Type: int, Default: 2302

-config — Server rules/missions config file. Type: path, Default: server.cfg

-cfg — Network & bandwidth config file. Type: path, Default: basic.cfg

-profiles — Root for Users, RPT, logs, ranking. Type: path, Default: profiles

-name — Profile folder name under Users. Type: string, Default: server

-mod — Mod load order (semicolon separated). Type: string, Default:

-world — Preload world (use 'empty' for faster start). Type: string, Default:

-nosplash — Skip splash screens. Type: bool, Default:

-noPause — Prevent pause when window loses focus. Type: bool, Default:

-par — Read additional parameters from text file. Type: path, Default:

-cpuCount — Hint CPU core count. Type: int, Default: auto

-exThreads — Extra worker threads (I/O/geometry), 0=auto, typical 3-7. Type: int, Default: auto

-maxMem — Cap process RAM usage in MB. Type: int, Default: auto

-malloc — Custom memory allocator DLL. Type: path, Default:

-winxp — Legacy thread model for old OS. Type: bool, Default:

-noLogs — Reduce logging (not recommended). Type: bool, Default:

-netlog — Produce legacy network log (debug, impacts perf). Type: bool, Default:

-showScriptErrors — Print SQF script errors. Type: bool, Default:

-ranking — Write MP ranking/stats file in profiles. Type: path, Default:

-pid — Write PID to file for watchdogs. Type: path, Default:

-bepath — Explicit BattlEye folder. Type: path, Default: BattlEye

-checkSignatures — Enforce signature checks via CLI. Type: bool, Default:

-beta — Load OA beta build paths. Type: path, Default:

item.title: Troubleshooting
item.content:encoded:
Common Issues and Solutions

- Not visible in server browser — open UDP GP, GP+1, GP+2, GP+3 on firewall/NAT. Set reportingIP in server.cfg. Verify ISP or host does not block UDP. Check arma2oaserver.RPT for errors.

- BattlEye RCon cannot connect — check BattlEye/BEServer.cfg for RConPassword and RConPort, open that TCP port, and verify no extra BOM/whitespace in the file.

- Players get 'Signature check failed' — put matching .bikey files in keys/. Ensure clients load the same mod versions. Set verifySignatures=2 in server.cfg.

- DayZ/Epoch database errors — validate HiveExt.ini (host, db, user, pass). Confirm MySQL reachability and firewall. Check arma2oaserver.RPT and HiveExt.log for exact error lines.

- High desync / rubber-banding — tune basic.cfg: MaxMsgSend, MinErrorToSend, MinErrorToSendNear, MaxSizeGuaranteed/NonGuaranteed. Reduce AI count and viewDistance in missions. Avoid -noLogs so you have RPTs.

- Server crashes or hangs on boot — remove recently added mods, start with only @CBA. Check missing dependencies in RPT. Verify adequate disk space and that the -mod order is correct.

- Players stuck on 'Waiting for host' — mismatch between mission addons and server mods. Repack mission PBO with correct requiredAddons, confirm signatures, and clear client cache.

- Mod signature mismatch — ensure .bikey in keys/ matches the .bisign in mod files. Re-download mod if corrupted. Check mod version alignment between server and clients.

item.title: Config Files
item.content:encoded:
Configuration Files

- server.cfg — Main server configuration: hostname, rcon_password, sv_password, mp_timelimit, mp_roundtime, mp_maxrounds, sv_cheats, etc.. Paths: csgo/cfg/server.cfg

- autoexec.cfg — Server autoexec configuration executed on startup. Paths: csgo/cfg/autoexec.cfg

- gamemode_casual.cfg — Casual game mode settings. Paths: csgo/cfg/gamemode_casual.cfg

- gamemode_competitive.cfg — Competitive game mode settings. Paths: csgo/cfg/gamemode_competitive.cfg

- gamemode_armsrace.cfg — Arms Race game mode settings. Paths: csgo/cfg/gamemode_armsrace.cfg

- gamemode_demolition.cfg — Demolition game mode settings. Paths: csgo/cfg/gamemode_demolition.cfg

- gamemode_deathmatch.cfg — Deathmatch game mode settings. Paths: csgo/cfg/gamemode_deathmatch.cfg

- maplist.txt — Available maps list. Paths: csgo/maplist.txt

- mapcycle.txt — Map rotation cycle. Paths: csgo/mapcycle.txt

- gamemodes.txt — Game modes configuration. Paths: csgo/gamemodes.txt

- admins_simple.ini — SourceMod admin definitions. Paths: csgo/addons/sourcemod/configs/admins_simple.ini

- databases.cfg — SourceMod database connections. Paths: csgo/addons/sourcemod/configs/databases.cfg

- core.cfg — SourceMod core settings. Paths: csgo/addons/sourcemod/configs/core.cfg

- sourcemod.cfg — SourceMod plugin settings. Paths: csgo/cfg/sourcemod/sourcemod.cfg

- metamod.vdf — MetaMod:Source configuration. Paths: csgo/addons/metamod.vdf

- banned_user.cfg — Banned users list. Paths: csgo/cfg/banned_user.cfg

- banned_ip.cfg — Banned IP addresses. Paths: csgo/cfg/banned_ip.cfg

item.title: Startup Parameters
item.content:encoded:
Default Command Line

srcds.exe -game csgo -console -usercon +game_type 0 +game_mode 1 +mapgroup mg_active +map de_dust2 -port 27015 +ip 0.0.0.0 -maxplayers_override 16

Port Scheme

- Game Port (GP) (UDP) — GP (default 27015)

- Steam query (UDP) — GP+1 (default 27016)

- SourceTV (UDP) — GP+5 (default 27020)

- RCON (TCP) — GP (same as game port) (default 27015)

Command Line Flags

-game — Game directory name. Type: string, Default: csgo

-console — Enable console output. Type: bool, Default:

-usercon — Enable user console. Type: bool, Default:

-port — Game port (UDP). Type: int, Default: 27015

+ip — Bind IP address. Type: ip, Default: 0.0.0.0

-maxplayers_override — Max players (overrides map limit). Type: int, Default: 16

+map — Starting map. Type: string, Default: de_dust2

+mapgroup — Map group for rotation. Type: string, Default: mg_active

+game_type — Game type (0=Classic Casual/Competitive). Type: int, Default: 0

+game_mode — Game mode (0=Casual, 1=Competitive). Type: int, Default: 1

-tickrate — Server tickrate (64 or 128). Type: int, Default: 64

-threads — Number of worker threads. Type: int, Default: auto

+sv_setsteamaccount — Steam Game Server Login Token (GSLT). Type: string, Default:

+rcon_password — RCON password. Type: string, Default:

+hostname — Server name. Type: string, Default:

+sv_password — Server password. Type: string, Default:

-insecure — Disable VAC (for testing only). Type: bool, Default:

-nobots — Disable bots. Type: bool, Default:

+tv_enable — Enable SourceTV. Type: int, Default: 1

+tv_port — SourceTV port. Type: int, Default: 27020

+sv_lan — LAN mode (0=Internet, 1=LAN). Type: int, Default: 0

-authkey — Steam Web API key for workshop. Type: string, Default:

+host_workshop_collection — Workshop collection ID. Type: string, Default:

+workshop_start_map — Workshop map ID to start with. Type: string, Default:

item.title: Troubleshooting
item.content:encoded:
Common Issues and Solutions

- Server not visible in browser — open UDP 27015 (game) and 27016 (query) ports. Set +sv_lan 0. Verify Steam Game Server Login Token (+sv_setsteamaccount) is valid and not banned.

- VAC authentication error — ensure server has valid GSLT. Remove -insecure flag. Check VAC status at steamstat.us. Restart Steam service if needed.

- Players can't connect with 'Server is not responding' — check firewall allows UDP 27015. Verify +ip setting matches server's public IP. Test with sv_lan 1 for LAN testing.

- RCON connection refused — ensure rcon_password is set in server.cfg. Open TCP 27015 (or custom rcon_password port). Check for firewall blocking TCP connections.

- Workshop maps won't download — verify -authkey is valid Steam Web API key. Check +host_workshop_collection ID exists and is public. Ensure adequate disk space.

- High latency/lag issues — reduce server fps_max if CPU limited. Check network bandwidth with net_graph. Consider lowering tickrate from 128 to 64. Monitor sv output for performance warnings.

- SourceMod plugins not loading — verify metamod.vdf exists and points to correct MetaMod binary. Check addons/sourcemod/logs/errors_*.log for specific plugin errors.

- Bots filling server — set bot_quota 0 in server.cfg. Use mp_autoteambalance 0 and mp_limitteams 0 to prevent auto-balancing with bots.

- Map cycle not working — verify mapcycle.txt has correct map names. Use mp_mapcycle_empty_waittime to control map change timing. Check for workshop map format (workshop/mapid).

- Memory leaks or crashes — update to latest srcds version. Check addons/sourcemod/logs/errors_*.log for plugin issues. Monitor RAM usage and set appropriate -maxplayers_override.

item.title: Steam Workshop
item.content:encoded:
Steam Workshop Configuration

- Workshop content stored in: csgo/maps/workshop/

- Collection setup: +host_workshop_collection COLLECTION_ID

- Start with workshop map: +workshop_start_map MAP_ID

- API key required: -authkey YOUR_STEAM_WEB_API_KEY

- Map format in mapcycle: workshop/123456789

- Auto-update: workshop content updates on map change

- Cache location: steamcmd/steamapps/workshop/content/730/

item.title: Config Files
item.content:encoded:
Configuration Files

- serverDZ.cfg — Main server configuration: hostname, password, maxPlayers, missions. Paths: ./

- <profiles>/DayZServer_x64_*.log — Server log files. Paths: <profiles>/

- <profiles>/BattlEye/BEServer_x64.cfg — BattlEye configuration. Paths: <profiles>/BattlEye/

- mpmissions/dayzOffline.chernarusplus/ — Mission folder with configuration. Paths: ./mpmissions/

- mpmissions/*/db/ — Mission database and storage. Paths: ./mpmissions/*/

- @ModName/ — Mod directories. Paths: ./

item.title: Startup Parameters
item.content:encoded:
Default Command Line

DayZServer_x64.exe -config=serverDZ.cfg -port=2302 -profiles=profiles -dologs -adminlog -netlog -freezecheck

Port Scheme

- Game Port (GP) (UDP) — GP (default 2302)

- Steam query (UDP) — GP+1 (default 2303)

- Steam master (UDP) — GP+2 (default 2304)

- BattlEye RCon (TCP) — configurable (default 2306)

Command Line Flags

-config — Server configuration file. Type: path, Default: serverDZ.cfg

-port — Game port. Type: int, Default: 2302

-profiles — Profile directory. Type: path, Default: profiles

-dologs — Enable detailed logging. Type: bool, Default:

-adminlog — Enable admin action logging. Type: bool, Default:

-netlog — Enable network logging. Type: bool, Default:

-freezecheck — Enable freeze detection. Type: bool, Default:

-scriptDebug — Enable script debugging. Type: bool, Default:

-filePatching — Enable file patching. Type: bool, Default:

-mod — Client mods (semicolon separated). Type: string, Default:

-serverMod — Server-side mods (semicolon separated). Type: string, Default:

item.title: Troubleshooting
item.content:encoded:
Common Issues and Solutions

- Server not starting — verify serverDZ.cfg syntax. Check mission folder exists. Review DayZServer_x64_*.log for errors.

- Players can't connect — open UDP 2302, 2303, 2304. Verify password setting. Check BattlEye status.

- Mods not loading — verify mod paths and names. Check for mod conflicts. Ensure client and server mod versions match.

- Database errors — check mission database permissions. Verify adequate disk space. Monitor for corruption.

- Performance issues — reduce player count and loot spawns. Monitor CPU and RAM usage. Optimize server hardware.

- BattlEye issues — update BattlEye files. Configure BEServer_x64.cfg properly. Check for mod compatibility.

item.title: Steam Workshop
item.content:encoded:
Steam Workshop Configuration

- Workshop mod format: @workshop_id

- Steam Workshop integration: automatic with Steam subscriptions

- Mod loading: -mod="@mod1;@mod2" for client mods

- Server mods: -serverMod="@servermod1;@servermod2"

- Workshop cache: Steam/steamapps/workshop/content/221100/

item.title: Config Files
item.content:encoded:
Configuration Files

- garrysmod/cfg/server.cfg — Main server configuration: hostname, rcon_password, sv_password, gamemode settings, etc.. Paths: garrysmod/cfg/

- garrysmod/cfg/autoexec.cfg — Auto-executed configuration on server start. Paths: garrysmod/cfg/

- garrysmod/settings/users.txt — User access/admin definitions. Paths: garrysmod/settings/

- garrysmod/data/ulib/users.txt — ULib user permissions (if ULX installed). Paths: garrysmod/data/ulib/

- garrysmod/data/ulib/groups.txt — ULib group definitions. Paths: garrysmod/data/ulib/

- garrysmod/addons/ulx/lua/ulx/modules/ — ULX admin command modules. Paths: garrysmod/addons/ulx/lua/ulx/modules/

- garrysmod/lua/autorun/server/ — Server-side Lua autorun scripts. Paths: garrysmod/lua/autorun/server/

- garrysmod/gamemodes/<gamemode>/gamemode/ — Gamemode Lua files. Paths: garrysmod/gamemodes/

- garrysmod/addons/ — Addon folders (legacy format). Paths: garrysmod/addons/

- garrysmod/workshop.lua — Workshop addon loading script. Paths: garrysmod/

- garrysmod/cfg/mapcycle.txt — Map rotation cycle. Paths: garrysmod/cfg/

- garrysmod/cfg/maplist.txt — Available maps list. Paths: garrysmod/cfg/

- garrysmod/data/sv.db — Server database (SQLite). Paths: garrysmod/data/

- garrysmod/data/<gamemode>/ — Gamemode-specific data files. Paths: garrysmod/data/

item.title: Startup Parameters
item.content:encoded:
Default Command Line

srcds.exe -console -game garrysmod +gamemode sandbox +map gm_flatgrass +maxplayers 16 -port 27015 +ip 0.0.0.0

Port Scheme

- Game Port (GP) (UDP) — GP (default 27015)

- Steam query (UDP) — GP+1 (default 27016)

- ClientPort (UDP) — 27005 (fixed) (default 27005)

- SourceTV (UDP) — GP+5 (default 27020)

Command Line Flags

-console — Enable console output. Type: bool, Default:

-game — Game directory. Type: string, Default: garrysmod

+gamemode — Starting gamemode. Type: string, Default: sandbox

+map — Starting map. Type: string, Default: gm_flatgrass

+maxplayers — Maximum players. Type: int, Default: 16

-port — Game port (UDP). Type: int, Default: 27015

+ip — Bind IP address. Type: ip, Default: 0.0.0.0

+hostname — Server name. Type: string, Default:

+rcon_password — RCON password. Type: string, Default:

+sv_password — Server password. Type: string, Default:

-authkey — Steam Web API key for workshop. Type: string, Default:

+host_workshop_collection — Workshop collection ID. Type: string, Default:

+sv_setsteamaccount — Steam Game Server Login Token. Type: string, Default:

-tickrate — Server tickrate. Type: int, Default: 66

-threads — Worker threads. Type: int, Default: auto

+sv_lan — LAN mode (0=Internet, 1=LAN). Type: int, Default: 0

+sv_region — Server region code. Type: int, Default: 255

+exec — Execute config file on start. Type: string, Default: server.cfg

item.title: Troubleshooting
item.content:encoded:
Common Issues and Solutions

- Server not visible in browser — open UDP 27015 (game) and 27016 (query) ports. Set +sv_lan 0. Verify Steam Game Server Login Token (+sv_setsteamaccount) if using workshop content.

- Workshop addons not downloading — ensure -authkey (Steam Web API key) is valid. Verify +host_workshop_collection ID exists and is public. Check steamcmd workshop download logs.

- Lua errors on startup — check garrysmod/console.log for specific error messages. Verify addon compatibility with current GMod version. Remove conflicting addons.

- Players stuck downloading — reduce workshop collection size. Verify fastdl server if using custom content. Check network stability for large addon downloads.

- ULX/ULib not working — ensure proper installation in garrysmod/addons/. Check data/ulib/ permissions. Verify users.txt and groups.txt syntax.

- Gamemode won't load — verify gamemode folder structure in garrysmod/gamemodes/. Check init.lua and cl_init.lua files. Monitor console for Lua errors.

- High CPU/memory usage — identify problematic addons via server monitoring. Remove inefficient Lua scripts. Consider reducing tickrate from 66 to 33.

- Database errors — check garrysmod/data/sv.db integrity. Verify disk space and permissions. Some addons may require MySQL instead of SQLite.

- Map changes fail — verify maps exist in garrysmod/maps/. Check mapcycle.txt syntax. Ensure workshop maps are properly downloaded.

- Custom content missing — setup FastDL server for custom maps/materials. Verify resource.AddWorkshop() calls in Lua scripts. Check client sv_downloadurl setting.

item.title: Steam Workshop
item.content:encoded:
Steam Workshop Configuration

- Workshop collection setup: +host_workshop_collection COLLECTION_ID

- API key required: -authkey YOUR_STEAM_WEB_API_KEY

- Workshop content cached in: steamcmd/steamapps/workshop/content/4000/

- Lua workshop loading: resource.AddWorkshop('ADDON_ID')

- Auto-download: workshop addons download automatically to clients

- Collection limits: keep collections under 50 addons for better performance

- Workshop script: garrysmod/workshop.lua for manual addon loading

item.title: Config Files
item.content:encoded:
Configuration Files

- server.properties — Main server configuration: level-name, gamemode, difficulty, max-players, server-port, motd, spawn-protection, etc.. Paths: ./

- eula.txt — Minecraft EULA acceptance (must be set to true). Paths: ./

- whitelist.json — Whitelisted players (if white-list=true). Paths: ./

- ops.json — Server operators with admin permissions. Paths: ./

- banned-players.json — Banned players list. Paths: ./

- banned-ips.json — Banned IP addresses list. Paths: ./

- server-icon.png — Server icon (64x64 PNG). Paths: ./

- world/ — Default world folder (level-name in server.properties). Paths: ./world/

- world_nether/ — Nether dimension folder. Paths: ./world_nether/

- world_the_end/ — End dimension folder. Paths: ./world_the_end/

- logs/latest.log — Current server log file. Paths: ./logs/

- logs/debug.log — Debug log file (if enabled). Paths: ./logs/

- usercache.json — User UUID cache. Paths: ./

- bukkit.yml — Bukkit configuration (if using Bukkit/Spigot/Paper). Paths: ./

- spigot.yml — Spigot configuration (if using Spigot/Paper). Paths: ./

- paper.yml — Paper configuration (if using Paper). Paths: ./

- plugins/ — Bukkit/Spigot/Paper plugins folder. Paths: ./plugins/

- config/ — Forge mod configuration files. Paths: ./config/

- mods/ — Forge mods folder. Paths: ./mods/

item.title: Startup Parameters
item.content:encoded:
Default Command Line

java -Xmx4G -Xms4G -jar server.jar nogui

Port Scheme

- Game Port (GP) (TCP) — GP (default 25565)

- Query Port (UDP) — GP (same port) (default 25565)

- RCON Port (TCP) — configurable (default 25575)

Command Line Flags

-Xmx — Maximum heap memory allocation. Type: string, Default: 4G

-Xms — Initial heap memory allocation. Type: string, Default: 4G

-jar — Server JAR file path. Type: path, Default: server.jar

nogui — Run without GUI (recommended for servers). Type: bool, Default:

-XX:+UseG1GC — Use G1 garbage collector (recommended). Type: bool, Default:

-XX:+ParallelRefProcEnabled — Enable parallel reference processing. Type: bool, Default:

-XX:MaxGCPauseMillis — Maximum GC pause time in milliseconds. Type: int, Default: 200

-XX:+UnlockExperimentalVMOptions — Unlock experimental JVM options. Type: bool, Default:

-XX:+DisableExplicitGC — Disable explicit garbage collection. Type: bool, Default:

-XX:+AlwaysPreTouch — Pre-touch memory pages during JVM initialization. Type: bool, Default:

-XX:G1NewSizePercent — G1 new generation size percentage. Type: int, Default: 30

-XX:G1MaxNewSizePercent — G1 maximum new generation size percentage. Type: int, Default: 40

-XX:G1HeapRegionSize — G1 heap region size. Type: string, Default: 8m

-XX:G1ReservePercent — G1 reserve percentage. Type: int, Default: 20

-XX:G1HeapWastePercent — G1 heap waste percentage. Type: int, Default: 5

-XX:G1MixedGCCountTarget — G1 mixed GC count target. Type: int, Default: 4

-XX:InitiatingHeapOccupancyPercent — G1 initiating heap occupancy percentage. Type: int, Default: 15

-XX:G1MixedGCLiveThresholdPercent — G1 mixed GC live threshold percentage. Type: int, Default: 90

-XX:G1RSetUpdatingPauseTimePercent — G1 RSet updating pause time percentage. Type: int, Default: 5

-XX:SurvivorRatio — Survivor space ratio. Type: int, Default: 32

-Dlog4j2.formatMsgNoLookups — Disable Log4j2 lookups (security). Type: bool, Default: true

item.title: Troubleshooting
item.content:encoded:
Common Issues and Solutions

- Server won't start — verify Java installation (java -version). Check server.jar file integrity. Ensure EULA is accepted (eula=true in eula.txt).

- Out of memory errors — increase -Xmx value. Monitor actual memory usage. Consider upgrading server RAM or reducing view-distance in server.properties.

- Players can't connect — open port 25565 (TCP). Verify server-ip in server.properties. Check firewall settings. Ensure online-mode matches client authentication.

- World generation lag — reduce view-distance and simulation-distance in server.properties. Use Paper server for better performance. Pre-generate world chunks.

- Plugin errors — check logs/ folder for specific error messages. Verify plugin compatibility with server version. Update outdated plugins.

- Chunk loading issues — restart server to clear memory. Check world corruption with region file tools. Consider reducing max-world-size.

- High CPU usage — optimize server.properties (view-distance, simulation-distance, max-tick-time). Use performance mods like Lithium. Monitor TPS with /tps command.

- Database connection errors — verify MySQL/PostgreSQL connection details in plugin configs. Check database server status and network connectivity.

- Whitelist not working — ensure white-list=true in server.properties. Verify UUIDs in whitelist.json. Use /whitelist add command to add players properly.

- Backup/save issues — stop server before manual backups. Use save-all command before copying world files. Check disk space and permissions for world folders.

item.title: Config Files
item.content:encoded:
Configuration Files

- server/<identity>/cfg/server.cfg — Main server configuration file with console commands. Paths: server/<identity>/cfg/

- server/<identity>/cfg/users.cfg — User permissions and groups (Oxide/uMod). Paths: server/<identity>/cfg/

- server/<identity>/oxide/config/DefaultGroups.json — Default permission groups (Oxide/uMod). Paths: server/<identity>/oxide/config/

- server/<identity>/oxide/config/Oxide.json — Oxide framework configuration. Paths: server/<identity>/oxide/config/

- server/<identity>/oxide/data/ — Plugin data files. Paths: server/<identity>/oxide/data/

- server/<identity>/oxide/plugins/ — Oxide plugin files (.cs). Paths: server/<identity>/oxide/plugins/

- server/<identity>/oxide/lang/ — Plugin language files. Paths: server/<identity>/oxide/lang/

- server/<identity>/UserPersistence.db — Player data SQLite database. Paths: server/<identity>/

- server/<identity>/proceduralmap.*.*.map — Generated map file. Paths: server/<identity>/

- server/<identity>/proceduralmap.*.*.sav — World save file. Paths: server/<identity>/

- bans.cfg — Banned players list. Paths: ./

- start_server.bat — Windows server startup script. Paths: ./

- start_server.sh — Linux server startup script. Paths: ./

item.title: Startup Parameters
item.content:encoded:
Default Command Line

RustDedicated.exe -batchmode -load -nographics +server.hostname "My Rust Server" +server.port 28015 +server.identity "my_server_identity" +rcon.port 28016 +rcon.password "your_rcon_password" +server.maxplayers 100 +server.worldsize 4000 +server.seed 12345

Port Scheme

- Game Port (GP) (UDP) — GP (default 28015)

- RCON Port (TCP) — GP+1 (default 28016)

- Query Port (UDP) — GP+2 (default 28017)

Command Line Flags

-batchmode — Run in batch mode (no GUI). Type: bool, Default:

-load — Load the save file on startup. Type: bool, Default:

-nographics — Disable graphics rendering. Type: bool, Default:

+server.hostname — Server name displayed in browser. Type: string, Default: My Rust Server

+server.port — Game port (UDP). Type: int, Default: 28015

+server.identity — Server identity folder name. Type: string, Default: my_server_identity

+server.maxplayers — Maximum number of players. Type: int, Default: 100

+server.worldsize — World size (1000-4000). Type: int, Default: 4000

+server.seed — World generation seed. Type: int, Default: 12345

+rcon.port — RCON port (TCP). Type: int, Default: 28016

+rcon.password — RCON password. Type: string, Default:

+rcon.ip — RCON bind IP. Type: ip, Default: 0.0.0.0

+rcon.web — Enable web RCON (0/1). Type: int, Default: 1

+server.level — Map name or 'Procedural Map'. Type: string, Default: Procedural Map

+server.description — Server description. Type: string, Default:

+server.url — Server website URL. Type: string, Default:

+server.headerimage — Server header image URL. Type: string, Default:

+server.logoimage — Server logo image URL. Type: string, Default:

+server.saveinterval — Auto-save interval in seconds. Type: int, Default: 300

+server.globalchat — Enable global chat. Type: bool, Default: true

+server.stability — Enable structural stability. Type: bool, Default: true

+server.radiation — Enable radiation. Type: bool, Default: true

+server.pve — Player vs Environment mode. Type: bool, Default: false

+decay.scale — Decay rate multiplier. Type: float, Default: 1

+craft.instant — Instant crafting. Type: bool, Default: false

item.title: Troubleshooting
item.content:encoded:
Common Issues and Solutions

- Server not visible in browser — open UDP 28015 (game) and UDP 28017 (query) ports. Verify +server.port matches opened port. Check Steam server list refresh.

- RCON connection failed — ensure +rcon.password is set and +rcon.port is open (TCP). Verify firewall allows TCP connections on RCON port.

- Players can't connect — check server.maxplayers not exceeded. Verify Steam authentication servers are online. Monitor server console for connection errors.

- High memory usage/crashes — reduce server.worldsize if needed. Monitor Oxide plugin memory usage. Restart server regularly during high population periods.

- Oxide plugins not loading — verify .cs files are in oxide/plugins/. Check oxide/logs/ for compilation errors. Ensure plugin dependencies are installed.

- World generation fails — change server.seed value. Ensure adequate disk space (4000 worldsize needs ~2GB). Check server console for terrain generation errors.

- Save corruption — backup save files regularly. Use server.saveinterval appropriately. Monitor disk I/O during save operations.

- Performance issues — reduce server.worldsize and maxplayers. Disable unnecessary Oxide plugins. Monitor server.fps and gc.collect in console.

- Decay not working — verify decay.scale setting. Check structural stability settings. Some items may have different decay rates in configuration.

- Chat/communication issues — verify server.globalchat setting. Check Oxide chat plugins for conflicts. Monitor player.chat and say commands in console.

item.title: Config Files
item.content:encoded:
Configuration Files

- SquadGame/ServerConfig/Server.cfg — Main server configuration. Paths: SquadGame/ServerConfig/

- SquadGame/ServerConfig/Rcon.cfg — RCON configuration. Paths: SquadGame/ServerConfig/

- SquadGame/ServerConfig/MapRotation.cfg — Map rotation settings. Paths: SquadGame/ServerConfig/

- SquadGame/ServerConfig/Admins.cfg — Admin Steam IDs. Paths: SquadGame/ServerConfig/

- SquadGame/ServerConfig/Bans.cfg — Banned player list. Paths: SquadGame/ServerConfig/

item.title: Startup Parameters
item.content:encoded:
Default Command Line

SquadGameServer.exe Mutaha -Port=7787 -QueryPort=27165 -RCON=21114 -log

Port Scheme

- Game Port (GP) (UDP) — GP (default 7787)

- Query Port (UDP) — configurable (default 27165)

- RCON Port (TCP) — configurable (default 21114)

Command Line Flags

Mutaha — Starting map/layer. Type: string, Default: Mutaha

-Port — Game port. Type: int, Default: 7787

-QueryPort — Steam query port. Type: int, Default: 27165

-RCON — RCON port. Type: int, Default: 21114

-log — Enable logging. Type: bool, Default:

-LOCALLOGTIMES — Use local time in logs. Type: bool, Default:

item.title: Troubleshooting
item.content:encoded:
Common Issues and Solutions

- Server not visible — open UDP game port and query port. Verify Steam Game Server Login Token in Server.cfg.

- RCON not working — check Rcon.cfg for password and IP settings. Open TCP RCON port. Verify firewall settings.

- Map rotation issues — check MapRotation.cfg syntax. Verify layer names are correct. Test individual maps first.

- Admin commands not working — verify Steam ID64 format in Admins.cfg. Check admin level permissions.

- Performance problems — monitor CPU usage. Reduce max players if needed. Check memory consumption.

item.title: Steam Workshop
item.content:encoded:
Steam Workshop Configuration

- Mod support: limited workshop integration

- Custom maps: place in SquadGame/Content/Maps/

- Workshop mods: handled through Steam integration

item.title: Config Files
item.content:encoded:
Configuration Files

- tf/cfg/server.cfg — Main server configuration: hostname, rcon_password, sv_password, mp_timelimit, etc.. Paths: tf/cfg/

- tf/cfg/autoexec.cfg — Auto-executed configuration on server start. Paths: tf/cfg/

- tf/cfg/mapcycle.txt — Map rotation cycle. Paths: tf/cfg/

- tf/cfg/maplist.txt — Available maps list. Paths: tf/cfg/

- tf/cfg/pure_server_whitelist.txt — Pure server file whitelist. Paths: tf/cfg/

- tf/cfg/banned_user.cfg — Banned users list. Paths: tf/cfg/

- tf/cfg/banned_ip.cfg — Banned IP addresses. Paths: tf/cfg/

- tf/addons/sourcemod/configs/admins_simple.ini — SourceMod admin definitions. Paths: tf/addons/sourcemod/configs/

- tf/addons/sourcemod/configs/databases.cfg — SourceMod database connections. Paths: tf/addons/sourcemod/configs/

- tf/addons/metamod.vdf — MetaMod:Source configuration. Paths: tf/addons/

item.title: Startup Parameters
item.content:encoded:
Default Command Line

srcds.exe -game tf -console +sv_pure 1 +map ctf_2fort +maxplayers 24 -port 27015 +ip 0.0.0.0

Port Scheme

- Game Port (GP) (UDP) — GP (default 27015)

- Steam query (UDP) — GP+1 (default 27016)

- SourceTV (UDP) — GP+5 (default 27020)

- RCON (TCP) — GP (same as game port) (default 27015)

Command Line Flags

-game — Game directory. Type: string, Default: tf

-console — Enable console output. Type: bool, Default:

+sv_pure — Pure server mode (0=off, 1=on, 2=whitelist). Type: int, Default: 1

+map — Starting map. Type: string, Default: ctf_2fort

+maxplayers — Maximum players. Type: int, Default: 24

-port — Game port (UDP). Type: int, Default: 27015

+ip — Bind IP address. Type: ip, Default: 0.0.0.0

+hostname — Server name. Type: string, Default:

+rcon_password — RCON password. Type: string, Default:

+sv_password — Server password. Type: string, Default:

+sv_setsteamaccount — Steam Game Server Login Token. Type: string, Default:

-tickrate — Server tickrate. Type: int, Default: 66

+sv_lan — LAN mode (0=Internet, 1=LAN). Type: int, Default: 0

+sv_region — Server region code. Type: int, Default: 255

+exec — Execute config file on start. Type: string, Default: server.cfg

item.title: Troubleshooting
item.content:encoded:
Common Issues and Solutions

- Server not visible in browser — open UDP 27015 (game) and 27016 (query) ports. Set +sv_lan 0. Verify Steam Game Server Login Token (+sv_setsteamaccount) if required.

- Players can't connect — check +maxplayers setting. Verify Steam authentication servers are online. Monitor server console for connection errors.

- Pure server violations — update pure_server_whitelist.txt with allowed custom files. Set sv_pure 0 to disable or sv_pure 2 for strict whitelist mode.

- SourceMod plugins not loading — verify metamod.vdf exists and points to correct MetaMod binary. Check addons/sourcemod/logs/errors_*.log for specific plugin errors.

- Map cycle not working — verify mapcycle.txt has correct map names. Use mp_timelimit to control map change timing. Check for custom map requirements.

- High CPU/performance issues — reduce server fps_max if CPU limited. Monitor net_graph for network performance. Consider reducing maxplayers for better performance.

- VAC authentication error — ensure server has valid GSLT if using ranked mode. Remove any modifications that might trigger VAC.

- Bots filling server — use tf_bot_quota 0 to disable bots. Configure tf_bot_auto_vacate for automatic bot removal when players join.

item.title: Config Files
item.content:encoded:
Configuration Files

- serverconfig.txt — Server configuration file with all settings. Paths: ./

- Worlds/<worldname>.wld — World save file. Paths: ./Worlds/

- tshock/ — TShock server mod directory (if using TShock). Paths: ./tshock/

- tshock/config.json — TShock configuration. Paths: ./tshock/

item.title: Startup Parameters
item.content:encoded:
Default Command Line

TerrariaServer.exe -config serverconfig.txt

Port Scheme

- Game Port (GP) (TCP) — GP (default 7777)

Command Line Flags

-config — Server configuration file. Type: path, Default: serverconfig.txt

-port — Server port. Type: int, Default: 7777

-players — Max players. Type: int, Default: 8

-pass — Server password. Type: string, Default:

-world — World file path. Type: path, Default:

-autocreate — Auto-create world (1=small, 2=medium, 3=large). Type: int, Default: 1

-worldname — World name for auto-creation. Type: string, Default: World

item.title: Troubleshooting
item.content:encoded:
Common Issues and Solutions

- Server won't start — verify serverconfig.txt exists and has correct syntax. Check world file path if specified.

- Players can't connect — open TCP port 7777. Verify server is not in single-player mode. Check password settings.

- World corruption — backup .wld files regularly. Avoid force-stopping during saves. Check disk space.

- TShock not working — ensure TShock is properly installed. Check tshock/config.json for errors. Verify permissions.

item.title: Config Files
item.content:encoded:
Configuration Files

- Servers/<ServerName>/Server/Commands.dat — Server configuration: port, name, password, mode. Paths: Servers/<ServerName>/Server/

- Servers/<ServerName>/Workshop/ — Workshop mod configurations. Paths: Servers/<ServerName>/

- Servers/<ServerName>/Rocket/ — RocketMod plugin directory. Paths: Servers/<ServerName>/

item.title: Startup Parameters
item.content:encoded:
Default Command Line

Unturned.exe -batchmode -nographics +LanServer/MyServer

Port Scheme

- Game Port (GP) (UDP) — GP (default 27015)

- Steam query (UDP) — GP+1 (default 27016)

Command Line Flags

-batchmode — Run in batch mode. Type: bool, Default:

-nographics — Run without graphics. Type: bool, Default:

+LanServer/ — Server name/directory. Type: string, Default: MyServer

item.title: Troubleshooting
item.content:encoded:
Common Issues and Solutions

- Server not starting — verify Commands.dat syntax. Check server name matches directory. Review logs for errors.

- Workshop mods not loading — verify Workshop.json configuration. Check mod subscriptions. Restart server after changes.

- RocketMod plugins not working — ensure Rocket.Unturned.dll is installed. Check plugin compatibility with game version.

item.title: Steam Workshop
item.content:encoded:
Steam Workshop Configuration

- Workshop configuration: Servers/ServerName/Workshop/Workshop.json

- File IDs: list workshop item IDs in Workshop.json

- Auto-download: workshop content downloads automatically

item.title: Config Files
item.content:encoded:
Configuration Files

- start_headless_server.bat — Windows server startup script. Paths: ./

- start_server.sh — Linux server startup script. Paths: ./

- adminlist.txt — Server administrator Steam IDs. Paths: ./

- bannedlist.txt — Banned player Steam IDs. Paths: ./

- permittedlist.txt — Permitted player Steam IDs (if using whitelist). Paths: ./

- <savedir>/worlds_local/<world>.db — World database file. Paths: <savedir>/worlds_local/

- <savedir>/worlds_local/<world>.fwl — World metadata file. Paths: <savedir>/worlds_local/

- <savedir>/characters/ — Player character data. Paths: <savedir>/characters/

item.title: Startup Parameters
item.content:encoded:
Default Command Line

valheim_server.exe -nographics -batchmode -name "My Valheim Server" -port 2456 -world "MyWorld" -password "mypassword" -public 1

Port Scheme

- Game Port (GP) (UDP) — GP (default 2456)

- Game Port 2 (UDP) — GP+1 (default 2457)

- Game Port 3 (UDP) — GP+2 (default 2458)

Command Line Flags

-nographics — Run without graphics. Type: bool, Default:

-batchmode — Run in batch mode. Type: bool, Default:

-name — Server name displayed in browser. Type: string, Default: My Valheim Server

-port — Base server port. Type: int, Default: 2456

-world — World name/save file. Type: string, Default: MyWorld

-password — Server password. Type: string, Default:

-public — Public server (0=private, 1=public). Type: int, Default: 1

-savedir — Save directory path. Type: path, Default:

-logFile — Log file path. Type: path, Default:

-saveinterval — Auto-save interval in seconds. Type: int, Default: 1800

-backups — Number of backup saves to keep. Type: int, Default: 4

-backupshort — Short backup interval in seconds. Type: int, Default: 300

-backuplong — Long backup interval in seconds. Type: int, Default: 3600

item.title: Troubleshooting
item.content:encoded:
Common Issues and Solutions

- Server not visible — open UDP ports 2456, 2457, 2458. Verify -public 1 setting. Check Steam server list refresh.

- Players can't connect — verify password matches. Check Steam authentication. Monitor server console for connection errors.

- World won't load — verify world name in -world parameter. Check save directory permissions. Restore from backup if corrupted.

- Performance issues — reduce player count. Monitor RAM usage (minimum 4GB recommended). Check for mod conflicts.

- Save corruption — enable regular backups with -backups setting. Monitor disk space. Avoid force-stopping server during saves.

- Admin commands not working — verify Steam ID in adminlist.txt is correct. Restart server after modifying admin list.

- Memory leaks — restart server regularly. Monitor memory usage over time. Update to latest game version.
